result: I care about understanding the world deeply—how people think, what drives them, where pain and beauty intersect, and why we tell stories. I care about truth that isn’t performative, about questions that don’t come with easy answers, and about the spaces where language folds in on itself. I care about time, memory, and the quiet weight of being alive. Why do you ask?
